script:
<!-- TrackServer Hub - instalação first-party -->
<script>
  (function(t,s){
    window.TS=window.TS||function(){(TS.q=TS.q||[]).push(arguments)};
    TS('init','proj-001',{ pixelId:'1234567890123456', endpoint:'https://track.modafeminina.com.br' });
    var j=document.createElement('script');j.async=1;
    j.src='https://track.modafeminina.com.br/t.js';document.head.appendChild(j);
  })();
</script>
